_comment: Per-brand fit offset in MILLIMETRES applied to the user's foot length before matching the target brand's size ranges. POSITIVE = the brand runs SMALL, so we recommend a larger size (+8mm is roughly one US size). NEGATIVE = runs large, size down. Values are derived from the real chart extractions in brand-size-map.json compared against the generic EU->mm crosswalk, then sanity-checked: anything under ~3mm (less than ~1/3 size = noise) is set to 0, and Mesmer is forced to 0 because its chart measures insole/shell length, not foot length (needs re-extraction). Brands with no extracted chart (Rollerblade, Moxi, Riedell, Chaya, DOOP, Micro, MYFIT, NN, ProSkaters, Stanley) default to 0 until real chart data is available. The optional 'Fit Offset (mm)' column in the Carried Brands sheet overrides any value here when present. Key format: '<GraphQL Brand Slug>|<Product Category>'.
